name: Albion Mutual — Team Console API (login · queue · action)
_comment: Backend for the per-team console. Each insurance team (SIU, Adjuster, Payments, Vulnerable Customer, Complaints) logs in, sees ONLY the claims Ava routed to their queue, and acts on them. Every action writes the new status, appends to the jeen.claim_events audit trail, and triggers an Ava email so the claimant is kept informed as the claim moves between teams. This is how human teams 'plug into' the workflow without touching the n8n editor.

parameters.query: SELECT username, full_name, team, role FROM jeen.team_users WHERE username = '{{ $json.body.username }}' AND password_hash = md5('{{ $json.body.password }}') LIMIT 1;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($json.full_name ? { ok:true, token:'REPLACE_TEAM_TOKEN', team:$json.team, user:$json.full_name, username:$json.username, role:$json.role } : { ok:false, error:'Invalid username or password' }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT claim_ref, to_char(received_at,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS received, claimant_name, claimant_email, policy_number, incident_type, claim_type, severity, fraud_risk, fraud_reasons, vulnerable_flag, vulnerable_reason, estimated_value, decision, team, status, payout_amount, payment_ref, decline_reason, next_step, ai_summary FROM jeen.claims WHERE team = '{{ $json.query.team }}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 200;
UPDATE jeen.claims SET {{ $json.set_clause }} WHERE claim_ref = '{{ $json.claim_ref }}' RETURNING claim_ref, claimant_name, claimant_email, status, payment_ref, decision, team, next_step;

INSERT INTO jeen.claim_events(claim_ref, team, actor, action, note) VALUES('{{ $('Resolve Action').item.json.claim_ref }}', '{{ $('Resolve Action').item.json.team_now }}', '{{ $('Resolve Action').item.json.actor }}', '{{ $('Resolve Action').item.json.ev }}', '{{ $('Resolve Action').item.json.note }}');

parameters.subject: =Update on your Albion Mutual claim {{ $('Update Claim').item.json.claim_ref }}
parameters.html:
=
Albion Mutual · powered by Jeen.ai

Dear {{ $('Update Claim').item.json.claimant_name }},

There is an update on your claim.

Claim reference
{{ $('Update Claim').item.json.claim_ref }}
Status: {{ $('Update Claim').item.json.status }}{{ $('Update Claim').item.json.payment_ref ? ' · Payment ref: ' + $('Update Claim').item.json.payment_ref : '' }}

{{ $('Update Claim').item.json.next_step }}

Warm regards,
Ava
AI Claims Assistant · Albion Mutual, powered by Jeen.ai

Automated message from Ava. Albion Mutual is authorised and regulated by the FCA.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok:true, claim_ref: $('Update Claim').item.json.claim_ref, status: $('Update Claim').item.json.status, team: $('Update Claim').item.json.team, payment_ref: $('Update Claim').item.json.payment_ref || null }) }}
